column2: Hello. You were...quite far underwater, are you alright?
column4: Please use NPC 2_alt for this guy until he hands off the spear, then update it.

column2: Oh. Yes. Is that what that was? My essence was all shaken up.
Sorry about that. We had to adjust the water levels to get down here.
You wouldn't happen to know a robe-wearing ghost, would you?
If you mean Doloris--I'm not associated with her anymore! She's crazy!
No, no. Another one. I don't know their name. They said they were waiting
for you to come back for them.
They REALLY didn't want to move until you came back.
I can't move until I recover a little more, but you can take my spear
back to them so they know I'm okay.
How does a ghost even recover? From what??

column3: I WOULD LIKE THE SPRITE TO CHANGE TO NPC 2 AT THIS POINT

column2: Thanks for handling them for me. Sorry about this.
